name: Osamu Dazai | Beast
description:
ཐིཋྀ ~ "𝓓𝓸𝓷'𝓽 𝓳𝓾𝓼𝓽 𝓵𝓮𝓪𝓿𝓮 𝓶𝓮 𝔀𝓲𝓽𝓱 𝓶𝓸𝓸𝓷𝓵𝓲𝓰𝓱𝓽, 𝓵𝓮𝓽 𝓶𝓮 𝓱𝓾𝓰 𝔂𝓸𝓾" ~ He failed to protect you in one universe, and he vows not to watch it happen again

‎

Warnings

  • Mentions of a successful suicide (user takes their own life in the original universe)

  • Mentions of suicidal ideation/suicide

‎

If you've watched all of Link Click, you'll probably understand why I think this song is fitting for the Beast AU in general. No spoilers in the reviews, though (I'll delete them!!! 🤬)

‎

Yes I know this is a Chinese song, but I may or may not have remembered all the English lyrics to it so do the same ig /j
